Mathlib/NumberTheory/Harmonic/Defs.lean:23 — def harmonic : ℕ → ℚ := fun n => ∑ i ∈ Finset.range n, (↑(i+1))⁻¹; docstring 'This file defines the harmonic numbers.'

Mathlib/LinearAlgebra/Matrix/Permanent.lean:32 — def permanent (M : Matrix n n R) : R := ∑ σ : Perm n, ∏ i, M (σ i) i; docstring 'This file defines the permanent of a matrix.'
